title: C++ Performance Optimization: From Theory to Practice
excerpt: Deep dive into C++ optimization techniques we use in production systems. Memory management, cache efficiency, and modern C++20 features that actually matter.
author: Yannon Chang

title: Building Production Computer Vision Pipelines in Python
excerpt: How we built Hoops Clips: a complete guide to production-ready computer vision with PyTorch, OpenCV, and proper error handling.
author: Charlie Han

title: Building Accessible React Native Apps: Lessons from GuidePup
excerpt: A comprehensive guide to accessibility in React Native, covering VoiceOver, semantic HTML, and building apps that work for everyone.
author: Charlie Han

title: Building GuidePup: An Accessibility-First Approach
excerpt: How we built an iOS app for blind users using GPT-4 Vision and React Native, prioritizing accessibility from day one.
author: Charlie Han

title: Shipping a Production App: Lessons from Ten Seconds VIP Manager
excerpt: What we learned building and deploying a real-world restaurant management system used daily in production.
author: Charlie Han

title: Emergent Behaviors in AI Predator Simulation
excerpt: Exploring how simple rules can create complex, realistic hunting behaviors in our Python-based ecosystem simulation.
author: Charlie Han

title: C++ getchar() 快速输入方式 - Fast Input Method in C++
excerpt: 详细介绍 getchar() 函数的基本用法及如何高效地利用它读取字符和整数。getchar() 函数能够从标准输入中读取一个字符并能接受空格，是一种比 scanf 和 cin 更快的输入方式。
author: Charlie Han
